title: satureja alpina var. viridis
intro: Satureja alpina var. viridis, also known as Green Alpine Savory, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Green Alpine Savory include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Satureja alpina var. viridis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to digestive issues and skin problems.
